namespace  llvm::AArch64_AM

enum  llvm::AArch64_AM::ShiftExtendType {
  llvm::AArch64_AM::InvalidShiftExtend = -1 , llvm::AArch64_AM::LSL = 0 , llvm::AArch64_AM::LSR , llvm::AArch64_AM::ASR ,
